reasoning: Market pricing for 2025 Fed rate cuts has shifted due to resilient US economic data and anticipated inflationary policies from the incoming administration (tariffs, immigration). Most major banks currently forecast between 1 and 3 rate cuts in 2025. The probability of exactly 4 cuts requires hitting a specific bin in a varied probability distribution. Assuming a Poisson or normally distributed expectation centered around 2.5 to 3 cuts, exactly 4 cuts holds approximately a 15% probability.
